steps.title: Compare the factored forms
steps.content: The target form is $ry^4(15y-9)$. Factor the original expression to make that same structure appear.

steps.title: Check the result
steps.content: Expanding the factored form confirms it: $$6y^4(15y-9)=90y^5-54y^4.$$ This matches the original expression, so $r=6$.
